label: Asheville flood shelter

public_context.label: Flood access constraints
public_context.body: Flood response can interrupt transport, medication access, charging, and safe route confirmation for shelter residents.

public_context.label: Water and power uncertainty
public_context.body: Source reports about water safety, power-dependent devices, and road closures should stay grouped for review until local staff confirm details.

boundaries: Flood context is not proof that a source report is true.
Road or water-safety claims require local review.
